hero.subtitle: Plan content, organize your feed, manage clients and let AI work with you. All in one place.

features.title: You don't need to work more.
features.subtitle: You need a system that works for you. You're just a few steps away from having it.
features.planner_desc: Plan and organize your content with an interactive visual calendar. Drag, drop and manage your posts with ease.
features.feed_desc: Preview and rearrange your Instagram feed before publishing. Keep a cohesive aesthetic with real-time drag & drop.
features.quotes_desc: Generate professionally designed quotes and export them to PDF. Impress your clients from the first contact.
features.accounting_desc: Track income, expenses and monthly balance with clear charts. Forget about messy spreadsheets.
features.team_desc: Invite collaborators, assign roles and work as a team without losing control of your projects.
features.reminders_desc: Never miss a deadline or meeting. Receive browser notifications with customizable priorities.

ai_section.title: Strat AI — Your social media assistant
ai_section.subtitle: Powered by advanced AI, Strat analyzes your strategy, suggests content and helps you grow faster.
ai_section.feat1: Personalized content ideas for your niche
ai_section.feat3: Smart daily summary of your productivity
ai_section.chat_msg1: Hi! I analyzed your feed. 3 posts have low engagement. Try alternating warm and cool colors ✨
ai_section.chat_user1: How much should I charge for a social media package?
ai_section.chat_msg2: Basic $300–500/mo (3 networks, 12 posts), Pro $600–900/mo (5 networks, 20 posts + stories) 💡

pricing.title: Plans for every stage
pricing.subtitle: Start free for 5 days.
pricing.basic_desc: For community managers just getting started
pricing.pro_desc: For professionals and agencies who want it all
pricing.guarantee_desc: If you're not satisfied within the first 30 days, we'll refund you no questions asked.

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.t1: Stratega Planner completely changed how I manage my clients. I used to use 5 different apps, now everything is in one place.
testimonials.t2: The Strat AI feature is incredible. It suggests content ideas and the PDF quotes look very professional.
testimonials.t3: I can finally see how my feed will look before publishing. The drag & drop organizer is exactly what I needed.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do I need a credit card for the free trial?
faq.a1: No. You can start your 5-day trial completely free without a credit card.
faq.q2: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a2: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time without penalties. You'll keep access until the end of the billing period.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept all major international credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express).
faq.q4: Is there a difference between monthly and annual billing?
faq.a4: With the annual plan you save 20% compared to monthly billing. Ideal if you plan to use Stratega Planner long-term.
faq.a5: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes apply at the next billing cycle.

cta_final.subtitle: Join the community managers who already organize their work intelligently. 5 days free, no commitment.
